title: Fast Mending
body:
# ⚡ Fast Mending (Fabric)

**Fast Mending** is a lightweight utility mod designed to fix one of Minecraft's most tedious mechanics: the slow repair speed of the Mending enchantment. 

Have you ever stood at an XP farm for 10 minutes just to repair a single pickaxe? Those days are over! This mod tweaks the experience-to-durability conversion ratio, allowing your gear to soak up XP much more efficiently.

### 🚀 Key Features
* **10x Faster Repair:** By default, Minecraft repairs 2 points of durability per 1 XP. This mod increases that to **20 points per 1 XP**.
* **Smart Repairing:** Works seamlessly with all Mending-enchanted items (tools, armor, weapons).
* **Zero Lag:** Built with high-performance Mixins, ensuring no impact on your server or client FPS.
* **Server-Side Support:** Only required on the server for multiplayer, but works perfectly in single-player too!

### 🔧 Why Use This?
In modern Minecraft (especially 1.21+), gear has high durability, and manual mending can feel like a chore. Fast Mending respects your time without making the game "too easy"—it simply removes the unnecessary waiting at XP grinders.

### 🛠 Installation & Requirements
1.  Make sure you have the **Fabric Loader** installed for **1.21.1**.
2.  Download the latest version of **Fast Mending**.
3.  Place the `.jar` file into your `%appdata%/.minecraft/mods` folder.
4.  (Highly Recommended) Install **Fabric API** to ensure maximum compatibility.

---
*Developed with ❤️ for the Fabric Community.*
